site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page for real estate agents who need instant lead response, automated follow-ups, listing workflows, and showing scheduling — powered by a personal AI agent that actually operates computers and reuses a computer-use cache for repeated work.
